app.pages.contact.offices.title: Regional Strategic Hubs
app.pages.contact.offices.subtitle: Connecting local industrial excellence to the global trade map.
app.pages.contact.offices.hq.title: Surat Headquarters
app.pages.contact.offices.hq.description: Our flagship operations center for textile manufacturing, agro-export coordination, and industrial trade policy — managing sourcing, logistics, and compliance across all regional hubs from a single strategic base in Gujarat.
app.pages.contact.faq.title: International Buyer FAQ
app.pages.contact.faq.q1.question: What is the minimum order quantity for international textile exports?
app.pages.contact.faq.q1.answer: Our standard MOQ starts at 500 meters for technical fabrics and 2,000 units for finished industrial products. Custom ESG-compliant sourcing may have different requirements based on the raw material availability.
app.pages.contact.faq.q2.question: How do you manage cold-chain logistics for fruit procurement?
app.pages.contact.faq.q2.answer: We utilize IoT-enabled reefer containers that provide real-time temperature and humidity tracking. Our logistics hub in Mumbai acts as the primary consolidation point for rapid air and sea dispatch.
app.pages.contact.faq.q3.question: Do you provide ESG and sustainability certification reports?
app.pages.contact.faq.q3.answer: Yes, all our textile products come with detailed ESG compliance reports, including carbon footprint analysis and ethical labor audits conducted by third-party global agencies.
app.pages.about.hero.title: Building Global Trade
app.pages.about.hero.description: We are an India-based export company committed to connecting international markets with high-quality products and dependable supply solutions. Through integrity, transparency, and long-term partnerships, we help businesses source with confidence and grow beyond borders.
app.pages.about.timeline.title: The Journey of Quality
app.pages.about.timeline.subtitle: A chronological testament to our growth from local sourcing to becoming a multi-sector export powerhouse.
app.pages.about.timeline.item1.title: The First Harvest
app.pages.about.timeline.item1.descripti: Established in Ahmedabad as a boutique textile sourcing house focusing on organic long-staple cotton for European luxury markets.
app.pages.about.timeline.item2.title: Agro-Export Expansion
app.pages.about.timeline.item2.descripti: Diversified into premium horticulture, launching our cold-chain infrastructure in Maharashtra for Mango and Pomegranate exports to the Middle East.
app.pages.about.timeline.item3.title: Industrial Modernist Era
app.pages.about.timeline.item3.descripti: Full integration of IoT-enabled logistics and sustainability-first ESG protocols across all textile and agro units, achieving GlobalGAP status.
app.pages.about.impact.title: Our Impact: Sowing the Seeds of Tomorrow
app.pages.about.impact.card1.title: Gujarat Textile Initiative
app.pages.about.impact.card1.description: Empowering over 15,000 cotton farmers through regenerative agriculture and zero-waste processing facilities in Ahmedabad.
app.pages.about.impact.card2.title: Maharashtra Cold-Chain ESG
app.pages.about.impact.card2.description: Reducing post-harvest losses by 40% using solar-powered storage solutions for pomegranate growers across the Sahyadri belt.
app.pages.about.impact.card3.title: Carbon Neutral Logistics
app.pages.about.impact.card3.description: Targeting net-zero emissions by 2030 through fleet electrification and sustainable packaging innovations.
app.pages.about.impact.net_zero.label: Net-Zero Target
app.pages.about.impact.net_zero.caption: Carbon Neutral Logistics
app.pages.about.testimonials.title: What our partners say
app.pages.about.testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by procurement teams and trade desks around the world.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t1.text: The quality of products and consistency in every shipment have exceeded our expectations. Their team is responsive, reliable, and always delivers on time.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t2.text: We've been sourcing from this export company for over two years, and every order has met international quality standards. A trustworthy long-term partner.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t3.text: Excellent communication, premium product quality, and timely deliveries. Their professionalism has made international procurement completely hassle-free.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t4.text: Their attention to detail in packaging and documentation is exceptional. Every shipment arrives exactly as committed, making them one of our most dependable suppliers.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t5.text: Working with this export company has simplified our sourcing process. Their commitment to quality and customer satisfaction truly sets them apart.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t6.text: Every order has been handled professionally from inquiry to delivery. Their reliability and transparency have earned our complete confidence.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t7.text: The consistency in product quality and prompt customer support have helped us maintain our own reputation with clients worldwide.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t8.text: Their export expertise and efficient logistics ensure smooth deliveries every time. We highly value this partnership.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t9.text: From pricing to shipment tracking, every step is handled with professionalism. Their team is always available to address our requirements quickly.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t10.text: Their products consistently meet our quality expectations, and deliveries are always on schedule. We confidently recommend them as a trusted export partner.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t11.text: We've experienced outstanding service, competitive pricing, and excellent product quality. Their team makes international sourcing effortless.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t12.text: Their commitment to maintaining export standards and delivering premium-quality products has made them one of our preferred suppliers.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t13.text: Every shipment reflects their dedication to quality, precision, and timely execution. It's a pleasure working with such a professional export team.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t14.text: The entire experience—from quotation to final delivery—has been seamless. Their reliability has helped us strengthen our own supply chain.
app.pages.about.testimonials.t15.text: A dependable export partner that consistently delivers superior quality products backed by excellent communication and customer service. We look forward to many more years of collaboration.
